column1: # PROVISIONAL — verify against ingested FastF1 data before relying on it.
# Constructor-level 2026 regulation context that FastF1 results do not carry.
# `constructor_key` is a lowercase-normalized team name; join is done case-insensitively
# and is validated in features/regs2026.py against the constructor_ids actually seen.
# pu_status / team_status flag 2026 discontinuities (the "regulation reset" signal).
